images.alt: A professional headshot of a confident male operations manager in his late 30s. He is wearing a dark, utilitarian button-down shirt. The lighting is crisp and cool, reflecting a modern, high-tech industrial environment. The background is a soft, out-of-focus deep blue and slate grey, complementing the dark mode UI aesthetic.
